channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 6 com severidade Alta
• 5 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-42530: Critical NGINX HTTP/3 Flaw Can Trigger DoS and Possible RCE - SOC Prime
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42530 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxOS1UxSzNDd19iOG9mcEZNajF0LUVkWUM3ak90Zy1pZng4UmxLZFZ1QXVwZGk1SUcwcWZ6RGkwTmV5RDFYVkxxai1QdS12VHVJR3JzVWhCeUp3a2VNaS16Ul9JOUhmMVllMVA2R1VGV2pmLTdTQUVwSGpoYVpGa09WWjkwLUYzMHNFMG9BVmJVUG5FTl9mbFc4c1l6VW9ab3Y1cXM4?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Bug to Expose API Keys
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting a recently patched security flaw impacting Gravity SMTP, a WordPress plugin that's installed on about 100,000 sites. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-4020 (CVSS score: 5.3), is a medium-severity information disclosure flaw that can allow unauthenticated attackers to extract sensitive data, such as configuration data, API keys, secrets, and OAuth tokens
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/hackers-exploit-gravity-smtp-wordpress.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-45696 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
OpenEXR is the reference implementation and specification for the EXR image format, widely used in the motion picture industry. In versions 3.4.0 through 3.4.11, the HTJ2K (High-Throughput JPEG 2000) decoder, ht_undo_impl() in OpenEXRCore is vulnerable to a heap-buffer-overflow READ. The ht_undo_imp function copies decoded pixels out of a per-line OpenJPH buffer using the EXR channel's declared width as the iteration...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45696
 
💣 AutoJack Attack Lets One Web Page Hijack AI Agent for Host Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft researchers have detailed an exploit chain, named AutoJack, that turns an AI browsing agent into a delivery vehicle for remote code execution. Steer the agent to load an attacker's web page, and that page's JavaScript can reach a privileged local service on the same machine and spawn a process on the host. No credentials, no sign-in screen, and no further user interaction once
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/autojack-attack-lets-one-web-page.html
 
💣 Hackers exploit info disclosure bug in Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors are exploiting an unauthenticated information disclosure vulnerability in the WordPress plugin Gravity SMTP, active on 100,000 sites.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-info-disclosure-bug-in-gravity-smtp-wordpress-plugin/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-32174 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
Improper authentication in Azure Bot Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32174
 
🚨 CVE-2026-49357 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Line Desktop MCP is a project that, while unaffiliated with the official line-bot-mcp-server, allows users to directly operate the LINE Desktop application on Windows or Mac via MCP. `line-desktop-mcp` supports a `--http-mode` Streamable HTTP transport for use with clients such as n8n. In this mode the server binds to `0.0.0.0` and exposes the MCP `/mcp` endpoint without an MCP-layer authentication check. Prior to ve...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49357
 
💣 Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Bug to Expose API Keys - The Hacker News
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxQdFFRWGU1a3g4bFVaeEhJdE9JRG5jX01jOFI0SUE5QlcyanNkSnNYSVVjeEgtMXR4dXhfQXJFVUJRNkVVMENYZVFTcHlyV3pjMWtTYU1DVmQ0MTVWZmhIclFsVzN0a3FYVFNlaGJJSzM1amhqeVBqWERYNktMbEpWVXZObw?oc=5
 
📰 Critical WordPress Plugin Vulnerability Exposes 1 Million Sites to File Deletion Attacks - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a WordPress, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 18/06/2026 até 20/06/2026.
